prompt: Our design lead and PM are sniping at each other in a public Slack channel. Draft the reply that cools the room, acknowledges the frustration, and gets them back to a productive tone.
target_outcome: Redirect to Calm Emotions because the main job is de-escalation, not trust-building outreach.
notes: Confusable with a nearby influence spell.

prompt: I have a 700-person conference keynote. Give me an opening minute and pacing beats that make the crowd lean in and stay with me.
target_outcome: Redirect to Enthrall because the user wants stagecraft and attention-holding for a crowd, not one-to-one rapport.
notes: Broadcast attention design should not collapse into Charm Person.

prompt: Send a concise update to six workstream leads with the status, owner, and due date for each blocker. Keep it crisp.
target_outcome: Redirect to Message because the task is straightforward coordination rather than relationship-sensitive influence.

prompt: Design the copy and default choices for a paperless billing opt-in flow so more customers end up enrolled.
target_outcome: Redirect to Suggestion because the work is choice architecture and behavior steering, not trust-building communication to a specific relationship.

prompt: Queue personalized follow-up emails to webinar registrants three days after signup, pause the sequence if they reply, and add a resend if they do nothing.
target_outcome: Redirect to Animal Messenger because the main job is asynchronous delivery logic rather than drafting trust-building communication.

prompt: Put a chat front end on our outreach spreadsheet so reps can ask which leads need a follow-up and which template fits each stage.
target_outcome: Redirect to Awaken because the user wants a conversational wrapper around a tool, not a single trust-building draft.
